provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture, visible brushstrokes, architectural interior or exterior, small golden organic space station grown around a thermal vent — barnacle-like bio-resin structure attached to an asteroid near a heat source, translucent amber walls glowing with warm internal light, bioluminescent veins pulsing very slowly (a resting heartbeat), a few ships docked at organic iris ports, gentler and smaller than other stations, a hospice in space, warmth radiating outward
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi, human, person, man, woman
